messages.content: What does the handbook say about phones?

The handbook says handheld devices are not to be used in the chapel or dining hall, and personal use of cell phones in classrooms is not allowed unless the teacher permits it. [source: 2025-26, page 36]
Is Marine Robotics Lab II listed at Webb?
I couldn't find support for that in the current Webb course catalog snapshot, so I don't want to guess. [source: Webb Math & Computer Science 2026-27]
